claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: multi-property reporting. it's not even close.
claims.object_value: multi-property reporting

claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: we lost cosmos hotels in q1 over it — they're a hotel chain, they need consolidated reporting across their properties with the ability to drill down per property, and we can't do that in a clean way. they went to a competitor.
claims.object_value: Cosmos Hotels lost in Q1 2026 due to lack of multi-property reporting; went to a competitor

claims.subject: multi-property reporting
claims.evidence: this gap has been on the roadmap for three quarters. every quarter we plan it in, every quarter it gets bumped because confluence work or a critical bug or an enterprise sales ask takes priority. so it's been on the list since roughly q3 2025 and it's still not built.
claims.object_value: on roadmap since roughly Q3 2025

claims.subject: multi-property reporting
claims.evidence: multi-property requires changes to the merchant data model and we've been told to not touch the data model until the merchant id schema migration is done. which means it's blocked behind confluence too.
claims.object_value: blocked by merchant ID schema migration (Project Confluence)

claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: sso for larger merchants, role-based access on the dashboard at the level enterprise wants it, and audit logs that are exportable in a format the bigger merchants' compliance teams accept.
claims.object_value: SSO for larger merchants; role-based access on dashboard; exportable audit logs for compliance
